subcodes.title: Words to Charles and Mariam Haney spoken in Feb. 1909
subcodes.first_line: I wished to see you early this morning but so many things engaged Me... Now give Me news from America.
subcodes.subjects: @universal peace; world unity, @critique of Western values; culture, @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @unity; oneness of humanity, @prejudice; racial prejudice; class distinction, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
